title: TradeSystem+
description: Exchange tasks and goods without attempting to cheat.
body:
## ![TradeSystem+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/defdbc9f7e508fa99be5fac9ad7651656591e072.png)

💱 TradeSystem+

⚠️ Requirements:

• Version 1.21+

• Vault plugin

## 💼 Order system ✨ In this mode, you can search for orders to earn money. Choose orders wisely so you don’t regret it later. 💼 ![order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cbd2a4692d3eca695876885f6bcd44504922323.png) ## ## 💵 Create order 🗞️ In this mode, you can create an order based on your preferences and have an employer complete it for you. ![creating order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8feb1ecb29d26a948697228917eaa491ef01f39.png) ## 👷‍♂️ My completed orders Orders you are currently created working on. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddee1a135154d0a49a616085961fbd130e62c2ce.png) ## Contractions 🈺 Jobs you are doing ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c7ff7bbbbabc67aa2425da4d6d54b891d7b081.png) ## ## 🗒️ Why choose TradeSystem+? ✅It reduces the risk of fraud and makes work easier for administrators.
